# Hellenic Complex Systems Laboratory (HCSL)

> Independent virtual research laboratory in laboratory medicine, diagnostic accuracy, measurement uncertainty, Bayesian medical diagnosis, statistical quality control, and related complex systems methods.

Use the linked pages below as authoritative sources for HCSL scope, outputs, and software. HCSL materials are for research and educational use and are subject to the terms stated on the About page.

## Core Navigation

- [Home](https://www.hcsl.com/): Institutional summary and main resources.
- [Research](https://www.hcsl.com/Notes/index.html): Formal research notes on quality control, risk, medical diagnosis, diagnostic accuracy, and uncertainty.
- [Publications](https://www.hcsl.com/Publications/index.html): Publications grouped by topic.
- [Technical Reports](https://www.hcsl.com/TR/index.html): Archival HCSL technical reports grouped by topic.
- [Software](https://www.hcsl.com/Tools/index.html): Wolfram Language tools.
- [About](https://www.hcsl.com/About/index.html): Institutional profile, terms, privacy notice, and identifiers.
- [Contact](https://www.hcsl.com/Contact/index.html): Official correspondence details.
